BindEip.eip: The EIP to be bound, including IPv4 EIP and IPv6 EIP
BindEip.clientToken: Idempotency token, see [Idempotency](EIP/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
BindEip.instanceType: The type of the instance to be bound
BindEip.instanceId: The ID of the instance to be bound
BindEip.instanceIp: The IP address within the instance to which the EIP will be bound
